Meaning.En: Located or moving toward the direction halfway between north and west.
Meaning.Example: The storm is expected to move in a northwest direction over the next 24 hours.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả vị trí hoặc hướng di chuyển giữa hướng bắc và tây.
Situation.En: Describing a position or direction lying between north and west on a compass.

Meaning.En: The part of a country or region that lies toward the northwest.
Meaning.Example: Many people have migrated from the northwest to the coastal cities for better opportunities.

Situation.Vi: Chỉ một khu vực địa lý cụ thể ở phía tây bắc của một quốc gia hoặc vùng.
Situation.En: Referring to a specific geographic region located in the northwest part of a country or area.
